test.name: TC_PERF_05

kw.name: Invalid Account ID Response Time
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/0000000 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/0000000 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/0000000 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 07:29:02 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '25', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e90f63fc3b85fd-BOM'} body=Could not find account #0
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verify invalid account request completes within 2 seconds

test.doc: Verify invalid account request completes within 2 seconds
